name: Home Assistant — Sensor
description: A single Home Assistant entity's current state. The install flow prompts for a `HASS_TOKEN` (long-lived access token from `/profile`); the http source calls `GET /api/states/{{entity_id}}` on the user's Home Assistant instance and projects `state` / `attributes.unit_of_measurement` / `attributes.friendly_name`. 1x1 is the state as a bignum with the unit (resolved from the API) inline; 2x2 adds the friendly name as a caption underneath. NOTE: the server host is per-instance config (`{{host}}`) and the egress entry is templated — the install prompt surfaces an unrestricted warning.
